content:
Saeid Ghasemshirazi is a cyber security researcher of seclab at the Stanford cybersec Lab. His research interests include distributed robotics, mobile computing and programmable matter. He leads the Robotic Neurobiology group, which develops self-reconfiguring robots, systems of self-organizing robots, and mobile sensor networks.

title: Saeid Ghasemshirazi
